items.title_en: Anthropic releases Mythos-like AI model to the public two months after private rollout rocked Wall Street
items.title_zh: 在私人推出震撼华尔街两个月后，Anthropic 向公众发布了类似 Mythos 的人工智能模型
items.desc_en: Anthropic said the broad release is possible because of new safeguards that block responses in specific high-risk areas.
items.desc_zh: Anthropic 表示，由于新的保障措施阻止了特定高风险区域的响应，因此广泛发布是可能的。

items.title_en: Two reportedly killed as women take part in rare protest in Afghanistan

items.desc_en: The demonstration, in the western city of Herat, was broken up after police are alleged to have opened fire.
items.desc_zh: 据称，警方开枪后，西部城市赫拉特的示威活动被驱散。

items.title_en: EU orders Meta to open WhatsApp to rival AI chatbots
items.title_zh: 欧盟命令 Meta 向人工智能聊天机器人开放 WhatsApp
items.desc_en: Meta has accused the EU of "regulatory overreach" and says its decision will allow tech giants like OpenAI free access to WhatsApp.
items.desc_zh: Meta 指责欧盟“监管越权”，并表示其决定将允许 OpenAI 等科技巨头免费使用 WhatsApp。

items.title_en: Israeli air strikes hit Lebanese city of Tyre despite Iranian warning to stop attacks
items.title_zh: 尽管伊朗警告停止袭击，以色列仍对黎巴嫩城市提尔发动空袭
items.desc_en: Iran warned Israel on Monday that it could resume hostilities if attacks on its Lebanese ally Hezbollah do not stop.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗周一警告以色列，如果不停止对其黎巴嫩盟友真主党的袭击，伊朗可能会恢复敌对行动。

items.title_en: Scrapping of Franco-German fighter jet leaves allies at odds on defence future
items.title_zh: 法德战斗机报废导致盟国在国防未来问题上出现分歧
items.desc_en: The flagship partnership project became a glaring example of discord between the two nations.
items.desc_zh: 这一旗舰伙伴关系项目成为两国之间不和的一个明显例子。

items.title_en: Murder of Lyhanna, 11, enrages France and turns up heat on government
items.title_zh: 11 岁莱哈娜 (Lyhanna) 被杀激怒法国并激怒政府
items.desc_en: Protesters are angry that the suspect had already been reported to police last August in a separate case.
items.desc_zh: 抗议者对嫌疑人去年八月在另一起案件中向警方报案感到愤怒。

items.title_en: I have right papers and visa - barred referee Artan
items.title_zh: 我有正确的文件和签证 - 被禁止的裁判 Artan
items.desc_en: Somali referee Omar Artan says he was subjected to an 11-hour immigration interview before being denied entry to the United States for the World Cup despite holding the "right papers" and "right visa"
items.desc_zh: 索马里裁判奥马尔·阿尔坦表示，尽管他持有“正确的文件”和“正确的签证”，但在被拒绝进入美国观看世界杯之前，他接受了长达 11 个小时的移民面试

items.title_en: Vinted boss sees 'fundamental' shift in consumer patterns, as secondhand firm notches $9 billion valuation
items.title_zh: Vinted 老板认为消费者模式发生“根本性”转变，二手公司估值达 90 亿美元
items.desc_en: Vinted is seeing a structural shift in consumer behaviour as habits form around the resale economy, its marketplace CEO told CNBC.
items.desc_zh: Vinted 市场首席执行官告诉 CNBC，随着转售经济习惯的形成，消费者行为发生了结构性转变。

items.desc_en: Protesters are concerned about cross-border infection risks and the lack of transparency from the government about the treatment centre.
items.desc_zh: 抗议者担心跨境感染风险以及政府对治疗中心缺乏透明度。

items.title_zh: 人形机器人会走向战场吗？

items.desc_zh: 武装部队正在试验人形机器人，但距离战场部署还有一段距离。

items.title_en: OpenAI plans to go public, intensifying investment race with Anthropic
items.title_zh: OpenAI拟上市，与Anthropic的投资竞赛加剧

items.desc_zh: ChatGPT 背后的公司在 Anthropic 提交计划一周后也提出了同样的计划。

items.title_en: Apple unveils Siri AI makeover as Tim Cook bids farewell
items.title_zh: 蒂姆·库克 (Tim Cook) 告别之际，苹果推出 Siri AI 改造版
items.desc_en: The technology giant also revealed a series of new child safety features amid widespread scrutiny over "nudification" apps.
items.desc_zh: 在对“裸体”应用程序的广泛审查中，这家科技巨头还推出了一系列新的儿童安全功能。

items.title_en: Jailed crypto founder Sam Bankman-Fried seeks Trump pardon

items.desc_en: The former leader of crypto platform FTX, currently serving a 25-year sentence, on Monday officially applied to be pardoned.
items.desc_zh: 加密货币平台 FTX 的前领导人目前正在服刑 25 年，周一正式申请赦免。

items.desc_zh: 公司将被期望激活内置功能来阻止儿童访问露骨的色情图片。

items.desc_zh: 美国总统周五表示，他预计下周将与顶级人工智能公司的领导人会面。
